body:
## Summary
- add focused question-provenance runtime validation for malformed question/tag/provenance inputs
- expose focused CSV provenance/source summary counters and summarize whole-bank source metadata drift
- include the runtime guard in full content validation

## Verification
- NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test --test-name-pattern "provenance|getQuestionProvenance|ProvenanceBadge|UHR|derived|editorial|invalid|tags|source note" scripts/static-site-source-provenance-copy.test.js tests/content-question-bank-csv-contract.test.js tests/content-question-card-accessibility-parity.test.js
- NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content
- npm run typecheck -- --pretty false
- npm run content:export
- node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check
- git diff --check HEAD^..HEAD
title: data-integrity: guard question provenance runtime inputs
